OptionDescription.SourceString: Text shown when requirements are not met, default is 'Missing Items: {missingitems}'. Using '{missingitems}' will auto-complete with all required key item names, it can be used at any point in the text line.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Text shown when requirements are not met, default is 'Missing Items: {missingitems}'. Using '{missingitems}' will auto-complete with all required key item names, it can be used at any point in the text line.
